title: Operator autocycle plan surfaces staged rank-2 scan window config
problem: Ticket-256 added staged_rank2_scan_max to operator_loop plan JSON; operator_autocycle plan output does not yet expose the same resolved scan window for autocycle operators.
acceptance_criteria: operator_autocycle --mode plan JSON includes staged_rank2_scan_max from load_config
Unit test asserts default and env override appear in autocycle plan output
Golden pass; no live LLM or public export changes
rollback_plan: Revert operator_autocycle plan field and unit test.
